---
title: "quarto-publish.yml"
---

Render a Quarto project and deploy it to GitHub Pages.
One-time setup: set Settings -> Pages -> Source to "GitHub Actions".
Build-only callers (`deploy: false`) skip the deploy.

## Inputs

| Input | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `path` | string | `'.'` | Path in the caller repo to the Quarto project to render (the directory with `_quarto.yml`). |
| `setup-r` | boolean | `false` | Install R and project R dependencies before rendering (for R/knitr Quarto projects). |
| `r-packages` | string | `(long; see workflow file)` | r-lib/actions package specs installed when `setup-r` is true and `use-renv` is false. Defaults to `any::knitr` and `any::rmarkdown`. |
| `use-renv` | boolean | `false` | Restore R dependencies with renv instead of `r-packages` (requires `setup-r`). |
| `tinytex` | boolean | `false` | Install TinyTeX (needed to render PDF outputs). |
| `apt-packages` | string | `''` | Extra apt packages to install before rendering (space-separated). |
| `output-dir` | string | `'_site'` | Directory the rendered site is written to and staged from, relative to `path`; forwarded to `quarto render --output-dir` and overrides any `_quarto.yml` setting. |
| `checkout-submodules` | boolean | `false` | Initialize the caller's git submodules before rendering. |
| `pre-render-artifact` | string | `''` | Name of a workflow-run artifact to download into the project before rendering, so an earlier job can inject build-time assets. Empty to skip. |
| `pre-render-artifact-path` | string | `''` | Directory in the caller repo to extract `pre-render-artifact` into. Defaults to the workspace root. |
| `deploy` | boolean | `true` | Deploy the rendered site to GitHub Pages. Set false to build only. |

## Secrets

| Secret | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `SUBMODULES_TOKEN` | no | Token with read access to private submodules (only needed when `checkout-submodules` is true). |

## Outputs

| Output | Description |
|---|---|
| `page_url` | The deployed GitHub Pages URL (empty when `deploy` is false). |

## Permissions

Grant `pages: write`, `id-token: write`, and `contents: read` to deploy.
Build-only callers (`deploy: false`) need just `contents: read`.

## Example

```yaml
# Copy to .github/workflows/quarto-publish.yml in your repo.
#
# Renders a Quarto site and deploys it to GitHub Pages. The calling job must
# grant pages:write and id-token:write (repos default to a read-only token).
#
# One-time repo setup: Settings -> Pages -> Build and deployment -> Source =
# "GitHub Actions". Until then the deploy step fails with a clear message.
name: Quarto Publish

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:
  # For a build-only PR preview (deploy: false below), also add:
  # pull_request:

# Let an in-flight Pages deploy finish rather than cancelling it.
concurrency:
  group: pages
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  publish:
    permissions:
      contents: read
      # pages/id-token are used only by the deploy step:
      pages: write      # omit when deploy: false
      id-token: write   # omit when deploy: false
    uses: d-morrison/gha/.github/workflows/quarto-publish.yml@v1
    # with:
    #   path: website          # Quarto project lives in a subdir (default: repo root)
    #   setup-r: true           # for R/knitr Quarto projects (default: false)
    #   use-renv: true          # restore R deps with renv instead of r-packages
    #   tinytex: true           # needed to render PDF outputs
    #   output-dir: docs        # render+stage to a dir other than the default _site (overrides _quarto.yml)
    #   checkout-submodules: true
    #   pre-render-artifact: demo-media       # inject a prior job's artifact before render
    #   pre-render-artifact-path: website/media
    #   deploy: false           # build only (e.g. a PR preview); skips the Pages deploy job,
    #                           # so the run needs only contents:read and no github-pages environment
    # secrets:
    #   SUBMODULES_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SUBMODULES_TOKEN }}
```

See [`examples/quarto-publish.yml`](https://github.com/d-morrison/gha/blob/main/examples/quarto-publish.yml)
for the full caller stub.
